# Remove Watermark Pro

> AI-powered watermark removal tool for photos and videos.

## About

Remove Watermark Pro (RemoveWatermarkPro) is a SaaS platform that uses AI inpainting and deep learning to remove watermarks, text, objects, backgrounds, and unwanted elements from images and videos. Available at https://removewatermarkspro.com.

## Core Tools

- **Watermark Remover** (`/watermark-remover`): AI-powered watermark removal from photos. Supports batch processing. Uses neural network-based inpainting to reconstruct the original image beneath the watermark.
- **Video Watermark Remover** (`/video-watermark-remover`): Remove watermarks from video files. Processes frame-by-frame with temporal consistency for clean results.
- **Background Remover** (`/background-remover`): Automatically detect and remove image backgrounds using computer vision segmentation.
- **Background Changer** (`/background-changer`): Replace image backgrounds with AI-generated or custom backgrounds.
- **Text Remover AI** (`/text-remover-ai`): Detect and remove text overlays from images using OCR + inpainting.
- **Object Remover AI** (`/object-remover-ai`): Select and remove unwanted objects from photos with AI fill.
- **Image Upscaler** (`/image-upscaler`): Enhance image resolution using super-resolution AI models.

## Pricing

- **Free tier**: 3 free watermark removals, no account required.
- **Pro plan**: $9.99/month for unlimited processing across all tools.

## Supported Languages

English, French (`/fr`), Spanish (`/es`), German (`/de`), Portuguese (`/pt`), Korean (`/ko`), Norwegian (`/no`).

## Blog

The blog at `/blog` covers guides on watermark removal, photo editing, video editing, AI tools comparisons, and digital content creation tips. Articles are data-driven, based on real-world testing of 40+ tools.

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel.
- AI models run via Replicate API.
- Images processed client-side for privacy; no images are stored on servers.

## Contact

Website: https://removewatermarkspro.com
